category_sources: source_facts.description says optimizer for PNG files; official pngcrush page describes reducing PNG IDAT data and removing/adding ancillary chunks.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading uses Pngcrush; source_facts.name is pngcrush.
docs_sources: Official pngcrush page is the main documentation surface and includes usage purpose, source links, build notes, and operational details.
repo_sources: Official pngcrush page states source can be cloned from git.code.sf.net/p/pmt/code and that pngcrush is in the pngcrush branch.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official pngcrush page identify PNG optimization, compression/filter trials, and command-line use.
